creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #13)
> 3096 COPYING or LICENSE files are installed. 585 of them are in DOCSDIR. You
> can't tell me that there's no precedent.

I'd have a hard time, true, but I'd conjecture quite a few of those are there because of a "copy tree" command rather than be excluded intentionally.



> There is nothing explained in bsd.licenses.mk.


line 75?
I didn't say it was great.
